classObjective: Determine whether a tessellation can be created from a given figure and describe the transformation(s) used.
workedExamples: 13-5, Example 4 — Determine Whether General Figures Tessellate
warmUp: What transformations are used to create a tessellation?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: uniform vs. non-uniform tessellations; regular vs. semiregular; transformation patterns in tessellations
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice analyzing tessellation patterns and determining tessellation capability
independentPractice: Practice problems classifying tessellations and describing transformation patterns
assessment: Exit ticket: analyze a tessellation pattern and describe the transformations used to create it
capReflection: What mathematical principles make tessellations possible?
